ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant is Best?

ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini are the top AI assistants in 2026. Here's how they compare across writing, coding, and reasoning.

A

AI Tools Team

Published June 28, 2026

Products Compared

ChatGPTClaudeGemini
Our Pick: Claude

ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini all have their strengths. Choosing between them depends on what you actually need. Here’s how they stack up.

Overview

Feature ChatGPT Claude Gemini
Developer OpenAI Anthropic Google
Best for General use Writing & analysis Google ecosystem
Context window 128K 200K 1M
Web access Yes Yes Yes
Image gen DALL·E No Imagen

Writing Quality

Claude produces the most natural, well-structured writing. ChatGPT is a close second. Gemini sometimes feels more robotic, though it’s improved.

Coding

All three are capable coders. Claude’s larger context window gives it an edge for complex projects. ChatGPT has the best plugin ecosystem for development tools.

Reasoning

For complex reasoning tasks, Claude and ChatGPT are neck and neck. Gemini has improved significantly but still trails slightly in logic-heavy tasks.

Related Articles

  • ChatGPT Review — Our full ChatGPT review
  • Claude vs ChatGPT for Coding — Head-to-head for coding tasks
  • Best AI API Platforms — Compare API providers for your projects

Our Pick

For most users, Claude offers the best combination of quality, context window, and value. ChatGPT is better if you need plugins and integrations. Gemini makes sense if you’re deep in the Google ecosystem.
